text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Today, Agnes Digital is running in a<n>scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's progressing slowly, with Agnes<n>Digital buried
right in the middle of the<n>pack.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is still grouped up as they<n>round the
fourth corner! Ohhh, what's<n>this?! Agnes Digital
has broken free!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: Good job breaking out of the pack.
Good job breaking out of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right?! I felt like I could really go for it<n>today, so I
did!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I freeze up at the thought of<n>accidentally
touching one of the other<n>runners...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I was in total control today. I felt<n>like I could get
through any gap.
choice_data_list: You were smooth and stable out there!
You were smooth and stable out there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I figure it's because of all the muscle<n>I've put on!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which is thanks to you! Now it feels<n>so good to
run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can run with other Umamusume<n>without holding
back, but also without<n>bothering them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pretty soon, I won't be fazed by<n>anything so long
as I've got your<n>trusty support!
